message.content:
I need to find and read the following in the oa-server project at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server:

1. In `app/Http/Controllers/Oa/DailyReportAiController.php`, find the `batchGetSummaries` method implementation. Read lines around it.

2. Find and read the DailyReportAiTunnel model file (likely in app/Models/DailyReportAiTunnel.php) - I need the table structure, relationships, and any constants.

3. Find and read the DailyReportAiRoom model file (likely in app/Models/DailyReportAiRoom.php) - same needs.

4. Find and read the DailyReport model file (app/Models/DailyReport.php) - specifically looking for STATUS constants and any scope methods related to submitted/committed reports.

5. Search for any existing method that queries "unreported personnel" or finds users who didn't submit daily reports in a time range. Search patterns: "未提交", "unreported", "no_report", "missing", "not submitted" in the Service directory.

6. In the route config file `config/sfuser_apis/daily_report_ai.php`, read the full file to see all registered endpoints.

Be thorough - read the full content of each file found.
